name: harness
description: feedback-blockers, reasoning-gaps, and setup commands for harness engineering, plus task-list-builder and task-list-runner skills for producing and executing structured task lists. Analyze code for feedback-loop blockers and AI reasoning gaps, build a paired JSON+markdown plan, and drive it to completion via sequential foreground Agent calls. Includes a PreToolUse hook that auto-approves invocations of the bundled task_list_cli.py mutator (read/write of one harness JSON file under docs/exec-plans/active/). (PostToolUse linting hooks moved to the separate linting-hooks plugin.)
